sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111145" key="filo/durmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλόδυρ-μος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111145.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of lamentation,</tr_> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> l. for sq. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:202" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.202</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
